description: Remove MCP resource and prompt support entirely from the SDK, build pipeline, MCP server, browser extension, E2E tests, plugins, and docs. These primitives add significant surface area but provide no practical value over tools for browser-session-based plugins.

userStories.title: Remove resource and prompt types from plugin-sdk
userStories.description: As a platform maintainer, I want to remove all resource and prompt type definitions and factory functions from the plugin SDK so that the SDK surface area is reduced to tools only.
acceptanceCriteria: ResourceContent, ResourceDefinition, ResourceContentType, defineResource are removed from platform/plugin-sdk/src/index.ts
PromptArgument, PromptMessage, PromptDefinition, TypedPromptConfig, DefinePrompt, definePrompt are removed from platform/plugin-sdk/src/index.ts
The resources and prompts optional properties are removed from the OpenTabsPlugin base class
All related tests in platform/plugin-sdk/src/index.test.ts are removed (describe blocks for defineResource, definePrompt, ResourceContent type)
All imports/exports of removed types are cleaned up
userStories.notes: In platform/plugin-sdk/src/index.ts: remove lines 33-155 (ResourceContent at 37-47, ResourceDefinition at 49-74, defineResource at 76-79, ResourceContentType at 81-93, PromptArgument at 99-107, PromptMessage at 109-115, PromptDefinition at 117-134, TypedPromptConfig at 136-146, DefinePrompt at 148-152, definePrompt at 154-155). Remove lines 202-205 (resources and prompts properties on OpenTabsPlugin). In platform/plugin-sdk/src/index.test.ts: remove the describe('defineResource') block at ~405-508, describe('definePrompt') at ~511-658, describe('ResourceContent type') at ~661-679, and their imports at lines 4-5 and 19-23. The ToolError.notFound description at errors.ts:45 mentions 'Resource not found' — this is a generic error category name, not related to MCP resources; leave it alone.

userStories.title: Remove resource and prompt manifest types from shared package
userStories.description: As a platform maintainer, I want to remove ManifestResource, ManifestPrompt, and ManifestPromptArgument from the shared package so downstream packages stop depending on them.
acceptanceCriteria: ManifestResource, ManifestPromptArgument, ManifestPrompt interfaces are removed from platform/shared/src/index.ts
The resources and prompts optional fields are removed from the PluginManifest interface
userStories.notes: In platform/shared/src/index.ts: remove ManifestResource (lines 108-114), ManifestPromptArgument (lines 116-121), ManifestPrompt (lines 123-128). Remove the resources field (line 82) and prompts field (line 83) from the PluginManifest interface. The comment at platform/shared/src/constants.ts:32 mentions 'tool/resource/prompt manifest' — update it to just mention tools. This will cause downstream type errors in mcp-server, plugin-tools, browser-extension, etc. — those are handled in later stories. The agent MUST NOT fix downstream errors; just remove the types and let later stories handle consumers. Run only the shared package build to verify: the full build will fail until consumers are updated.

In state.ts: remove ManifestResource/ManifestPrompt imports (17-18), resources/prompts from RegisteredPlugin (91-92), ResourceLookupEntry (171-176), PromptLookupEntry (178-183), resourceLookup/promptLookup from PluginRegistry (199, 201), EMPTY_REGISTRY entries (361-362), prefixedResourceUri (425-426), prefixedPromptName (428-429). userStories.title: Update CLAUDE.md files to reflect removal and document rationale in plugin-sdk
userStories.description: As a platform maintainer, I want all CLAUDE.md files updated to remove resource/prompt references and add a rationale section in the plugin-sdk CLAUDE.md explaining why resources and prompts were removed.
acceptanceCriteria: Root CLAUDE.md updated: remove resource/prompt mentions from architecture overview, key concepts, and MCP server description
platform/plugin-sdk/CLAUDE.md updated: remove defineResource/definePrompt from overview and key files, add a section explaining why resources and prompts are not supported
platform/mcp-server/CLAUDE.md updated: remove resource/prompt references from overview and file descriptions
platform/browser-extension/CLAUDE.md updated: remove resource/prompt dispatch documentation
platform/plugin-tools/CLAUDE.md updated: remove resource/prompt metadata references
userStories.notes: Root CLAUDE.md: update line 28 (MCP server description — remove 'resource/prompt dispatch'), line 32 (Plugin SDK — remove defineResource/definePrompt), line 70 ('Tool and prompt name prefixing' — remove prompt part or keep if only tool prefixing remains), line 72 ('Resource URI prefixing' — remove entire concept). platform/plugin-sdk/CLAUDE.md: update line 5 (remove defineResource/definePrompt), line 11 (remove from key files). Add a new section titled '## Why Resources and Prompts Are Not Supported' with this rationale: The MCP spec defines resources (read-only data sources) and prompts (parameterized message templates) alongside tools. OpenTabs intentionally does not support these primitives because: (1) Tools are strictly more capable — a tool can do everything a resource can do, with the addition of input validation, progress reporting, lifecycle hooks, and output schemas. There is no plugin use case where a resource is the right choice over a tool. (2) Prompts have no practical use case in browser-session plugins — generating prompt templates does not require an authenticated browser session. If prompts are static, they don't need a browser. If they're dynamic based on page state, a tool should read that state. (3) Every real-world plugin is fundamentally about actions (send message, create ticket, query metrics). The read operations that come along are naturally tools with parameters. (4) Removing these primitives reduces the SDK surface area, simplifies the build pipeline, dispatch chain, and server internals. platform/mcp-server/CLAUDE.md: update lines 5, 18, 20, 29, 43-45. platform/browser-extension/CLAUDE.md: update lines 130-135. platform/plugin-tools/CLAUDE.md: update lines 5, 24. plugins/CLAUDE.md: update line 28.
